tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove superseded configs (wofi, wlogout, kitty, placeholder)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete unused tool configs and every reference to them; docs match reality.

**Files:**
- Delete: wofi/config, wofi/style.css, wlogout/layout, wlogout/style.css, kitty/kitty.conf, scripts/settings/placeholder.sh
- Modify: install.sh:96,98,184-185, scripts/hyprland/startup.sh:7-8, scripts/fonts/apply-font.sh:59-69,85-93, scripts/settings/settings.sh:194, .gitignore:202,206,318,321,322, CLAUDE.md:31 + stack table, QUICKSTART.md:65, README.md:189

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- grep -rniE "wofi|wlogout|kitty" --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=docs --exclude=CHANGELOG.md . returns nothing
- ./install.sh --dry-run completes without error
- bash -n passes on all four edited scripts

**Verify:** the grep above -> empty; ./install.sh --dry-run -> "Installation Complete!" banner

```json:metadata
{"files": ["wofi/", "wlogout/", "kitty/kitty.conf", "scripts/settings/placeholder.sh", "install.sh", "scripts/hyprland/startup.sh", "scripts/fonts/apply-font.sh", "scripts/settings/settings.sh", ".gitignore", "CLAUDE.md", "QUICKSTART.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rniE \"wofi|wlogout|kitty\" --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=docs --exclude=CHANGELOG.md . ; ./install.sh --dry-run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grep for removed tools returns nothing outside CHANGELOG/docs", "install.sh --dry-run completes", "bash -n passes on edited scripts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wallpaper-churn fix — generated state to ~/.cache via tracked symlinks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wallpaper switches never dirty git; the four churning files become stable tracked symlinks into ~/.cache.

**Files:**
- Modify: scripts/hyprland/wall.sh:22-24, mako/apply_wal_colors.sh, install.sh:257-266, CLAUDE.md
- Create: waypaper/config.ini.template
- Convert to symlinks: options/wallpaper -> ../../.cache/current_wallpaper; rofi/options/wallpaper.rasi -> ../../../.cache/wal/rofi-wallpaper.rasi; mako/config -> ../../.cache/wal/mako-config; waypaper/config.ini -> ../../.cache/waypaper-config.ini

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- After a wallpaper switch (CLI and GUI): git status --short is empty
- All four paths are symlinks resolving to existing files
- Colors propagate (ghostty, waybar, mako, swaync, rofi background)
- ./install.sh --dry-run still completes
- Plan B applied to waypaper only if its save replaces the symlink (untrack + config.ini.example)

**Verify:** waypaper --wallpaper <path> then git status --short -> empty; find options/wallpaper rofi/options/wallpaper.rasi mako/config waypaper/config.ini -type l | wc -l -> 4

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/hyprland/wall.sh", "mako/apply_wal_colors.sh", "install.sh", "waypaper/config.ini.template", "options/wallpaper", "rofi/options/wallpaper.rasi", "mako/config", "waypaper/config.ini", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "waypaper --wallpaper ~/Pictures/Wallpapers/earth-planet-space.jpg && sleep 3 && git status --short && find options/wallpaper rofi/options/wallpaper.rasi mako/config waypaper/config.ini -type l | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git status clean after CLI and GUI wallpaper switch", "4 symlinks resolve", "colors propagate", "install.sh --dry-run completes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shellcheck cleanup pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** All tracked scripts pass shellcheck at warning level (or carry a justified inline suppression); no behavior changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: any of the ~30 tracked *.sh files flagged by shellcheck

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- shellcheck -S warning $(git ls-files '*.sh') exits 0
- Any '# shellcheck disable=' carries a one-line justification
- eww lines untouched (eww installed, clock feature active); wall.sh sleep timing untouched
- bash -n passes on every tracked script

**Verify:** shellcheck -S warning $(git ls-files '*.sh'); echo $? -> 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/", "rofi/", "swaync/", "waybar/", "sddm/", "ghostty/", "mako/", "Thunar/"], "verifyCommand": "shellcheck -S warning $(git ls-files '*.sh'); echo exit=$?", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shellcheck warning-level exit 0", "bash -n passes on all scripts", "no behavior changes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Residual churn fix — ghostty/config and gtk-3.0/gtk.css
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Palette-changing wallpaper switches no longer dirty ghostty/config or gtk-3.0/gtk.css; generated blocks render to ~/.cache (ghostty-colors, thunar-gtk.css) reached via ghostty config-file include and GTK @import, each backed by a tracked relative symlink. See plan Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ghostty/apply_wal_colors.sh", "Thunar/apply_wal_colors.sh", "ghostty/config", "gtk-3.0/gtk.css", "ghostty/colors", "gtk-3.0/thunar-colors.css", "install.sh", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "waypaper --wallpaper <different-palette> && sleep 4 && git status --short", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git status clean after palette-changing switch", "ghostty include works", "install dry-run completes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Track .claude/ and paneflow/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Claude Code project config and paneflow prefs are tracked; their runtime state is ignored.

**Files:**
- Modify: .gitignore (add .claude/.paneflow-hook-leases/)
- Track: .claude/settings.local.json, paneflow/paneflow.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- git status --short shows no ?? entries for .claude/ or paneflow/
- .claude/.paneflow-hook-leases/ is ignored
- No secrets in tracked files (verified: hooks + permission allowlists + UI prefs only)

**Verify:** git check-ignore .claude/.paneflow-hook-leases/test && echo ignored -> ignored; git status --short shows no ?? entries

```json:metadata
{"files": [".gitignore", ".claude/settings.local.json", "paneflow/paneflow.json"], "verifyCommand": "git check-ignore .claude/.paneflow-hook-leases/test && git status --short", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no ?? entries for .claude or paneflow", "lease dir ignored", "no secrets tracked"]}
```
